---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature for Cloky
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Why is the current behavior insufficient?

## Proposed solution

How should it work? Be specific:

- New commands?
- New env vars?
- Changes to existing behavior?

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve this problem.

## Compatibility

- Does it require new Python packages? (Cloky is stdlib-only; if yes, justify.)
- Does it affect the sandbox model?
- Does it break backward compatibility with previous versions?

## Use case

Concrete example of how you'd use this.
